missing_dot_net_title.description: Messagebox title for not having .NET framework installed

missing_dot_net_message_click_to_install.description: When .NET framework is missing and we have the installation ready, we show this message allowing the user to automatically launch the .NET installation
missing_dot_net_message_click_to_install.message:
Overwolf requires Microsoft .NET 4.8 installed in order 
 to run. Click OK to update your system, and relaunch
 Overwolf once the update is complete.

missing_dot_net_message_click_to_downloa.description: When .NET framework is missing but we do not have the installation ready, we show this message allowing the user to open the download page in his default browser
missing_dot_net_message_click_to_downloa.message:
Overwolf requires Microsoft .NET 4.8 installed in order 
 to run. Click OK to open the Microsoft download page,
 and relaunch Overwolf once the update is complete.

status_first_launch.description: Status line (on the bottom of the splash screen) shown only during the first time the user launches Overwolf

status_overwolf_launching.description: Status line shown when launching Overwolf (after it has been launched for the first time)

status_extension_launching.description: Status line shown when launching an extension (after Overwolf has been launched for the first time)

client_error_title.description: The title of the error shown when failing to launch Overwolf client (due to a corrupted installation or other unknown reason)

client_error_message.description:
The message of the error shown when failing to launch Overwolf client (use 
 for enters)
client_error_message.message:
This Overwolf version is broken beyond repair.
Please download and install our latest version
to fix this.

(Oh, and this conversation never happened)
